creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
It did not build at the time, so, I marked it broken, I don't remember why it was failing.

I would love to have the time to do research and fix everything, but it is not the role of portmgr, our role is to keep the ports tree in the best possible shape.
And doing this, we do mark things broken when they do not build so that they do not take unnecessary build time for nothing.
